$comment: TF-C56 (D-CSUBSET-BARE-CHAR-SIGNEDNESS-PER-TARGET): bare `char`'s signedness is target-config-driven — signed on x86_64 (SysV + pe64), UNSIGNED on arm64 (AArch64 ABI). ONE source; per-target exitCode witnesses the divergence: `char c=(char)0x80; c<0` is TRUE→10 on the signed-char targets, FALSE→20 on the unsigned-char targets. The `volatile` seed defeats const-folding so the release arm runs the real machine char->int extension (SExt vs ZExt/uxtb).
